'''Xijulba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who was a member of the family of the famous [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] and also the [[Sebolto]] Clan on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he had a bounty posted on his head by a hateful rival of his podracing relative, [[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]]. The bounty was eventually collected by the bounty hunter, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
Xijulba's bounty was 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,000 credits dead. It was left for the player to decide, however considering that Xijulba was worth more alive.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
